stem: Each year, the value of an account decreases by 0.62% of its value the previous year. Which of the following functions best models how the value of the account changes over time?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. A constant percentage change applied each period produces exponential change. Since the percentage represents a decrease, the model is a decreasing exponential function.

Choices C and D model constant additive change, not percentage change. Choice B has the wrong direction.
